name: Playwright
description: Playwright — Test Automation / Device Cloud tool for developers. Specializes in browser automation.

seo.title: Playwright Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Playwright analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Test Automation / Device Cloud.

review.verdict: Playwright is a Test Automation / Device Cloud tool.
pros: Parallel test execution across real devices reduces flakiness
cons: Device cloud minutes add up for large test suites
review.best_for: Mobile and web teams needing cross-device coverage
review.not_for: Projects with minimal UI or no regression testing needs
